retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages and SOC PDF. Normalize before shipping to UI.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Mashal Women account gives 50% discount on debit-card annual fee and 100% waiver at PKR 100,000 average balance for Classic and PayPak.

notes: Fee logic depends partly on the underlying account relationship.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Mashal Women account gives 50% discount on annual fee and 100% waiver at PKR 100,000 average balance for Classic and PayPak.
Priority Banking page indicates issuance and replacement fee waivers for the Priority Titanium Debit Mastercard.

notes: Priority Titanium appears to be a distinct premium variant and should be modeled separately later.

gaps: No clear public consumer credit-card catalogue was found in this pass.
Public pages do not clearly publish salary, age, or balance thresholds for ordinary debit cards.
The cleanest fee source is the 2026 SOC PDF.
